market_pulse: LIV Nightclub maintains strong weekend talent (Cloonee, Tiësto, Dombresky Fri-Sun); competitors focusing on established residencies (OMNIA, XS, Zouk) with mid-week event concentration.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) are using countdown stories to build anticipation for weekend events; LIV social shows events but minimal story strategy.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown stories Fri 6/5 at 10 AM for Cloonee event; 5-8 story progression through day.

content_gaps.description: XS and OMNIA leveraging promoter networks (@omnianightclubpromoter 30K followers, guestlist handles); LIV has promoter presence but lower cross-promotion visibility.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag top 3 Vegas influencers in Cloonee/Tiësto posts; cross-post to promoter accounts.

content_gaps.description: Tao Group venues (OMNIA, TAO Beach, Hakkasan) receiving heavy UGC tags and location check-ins; LIV Instagram tags present but lower volume.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create branded #LIVUnderTheHalo hashtag; repost 2-3 guest UGC posts daily.
